subject: docs: update documentation for DaisyUI theme integration
body:
Update CLAUDE.md with new tech stack (Tailwind CSS v4 + DaisyUI v5),
project structure (config/daisyuiThemes.ts, hooks/useTheme.ts), theme
conventions, CSS variable bridge docs, and button migration notes.
Add Theme & Dark Mode milestone to HISTORY.md. Rewrite SESSION_NOTES.

Tags: docs, theme, daisyui

Urgency: 2
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: neutral
Epic: theme-dark-mode
